dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses generic SMA crossover without specified periods. Used sma_10 (shorter-term) and sma_50 (longer-term) as standard trend-following periods. Volume confirmation added using prev_volume comparison. Price close conditions use the shorter SMA (sma_10) as reference. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification—entries and exits trigger in both directions based on crossover direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses generic SMA crossover without specified periods. Used sma_10 (shorter-term) and sma_50 (longer-term) as standard trend-following periods. Volume confirmation added using prev_volume comparison. Price close conditions use the shorter SMA (sma_10) as reference. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification—entries and exits trigger in both directions based on crossover direction.

source_rule_text: A trader should initiate a long position when a shorter-term SMA exceeds a longer-term SMA, and initiate a neutral or short position when the opposite occurs.
